_INSTRUCTIONS: 2. Create a project named 'agrilens' (or use an existing one)
3. Project Settings → Service Accounts → Generate new private key
4. Rename the downloaded file to: firebase-service-account.json
5. Place it in this same directory (notification-service/secrets/)
6. NEVER commit firebase-service-account.json to git (it is in .gitignore)
private_key:
-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
REPLACE_WITH_PRIVATE_KEY
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
